case_title: JEAN L BATMAN VS. ALLISON BERARDI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-30-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JEAN BATMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLISON BERARDI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES; (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,108.84 FILED BY BATMAN, JEAN L AS TO DEFENDANT BERARDI, ALLISON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 3/30/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
